gazette: The Official Gazette numbered 32229 and dated June 22, 2023.
title: Tariff quotas opened for certain agricultural products of Uzbekistan origin
bodyHtml:
A tariff quota has been opened for certain agricultural products of Uzbekistan origin in accordance with the Preferential Trade Agreement between Turkey and Uzbekistan. According to the Decision on the Application of Tariff Quotas for the Import of Certain Products of the Republic of Uzbekistan (Decision Number: 7319), customs duties and, if any, additional financial obligations for the following products will be applied as 0 (zero) within the framework of tariff quotas:

Onions, vegetable mixtures, chickpeas, beans, shelled almonds and walnuts, dried grapes, plums, certain types of fruits, dried peppers, and shelled peanuts.

The tariff quotas range from 400 to 4000 tons annually for each specific product.

The distribution of tariff quotas will be based on the registration number of the customs declaration (BSGTY) related to the imported goods.

For the Decision and Distribution Regulation regarding the quotas, which will enter into force on July 1, 2023, please click here.
